posts.hook: Open-source AI's biggest threat yet is coming from Washington, not China
posts.caption: the white house may ban open ai models within six months, anthropic leads the campaign against chinese labs, and claude code sends 33k tokens before it even reads your prompt. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: White House weighs a ban on open AI models within six months
slides.desc: Anthropic leads the campaign against Chinese-origin models; a rival lab founder pushes back

slides.title: Anthropic extends Claude Fable 5 access again, through July 19
slides.desc: A fast reversal, two days after moving Fable 5 to pay-per-token billing

slides.title: Claude Code sends 33k tokens before reading your prompt
slides.desc: OpenCode sends 7k, but Claude Code's total task cost can still come out lower

slides.title: A tiny math function now leaks your OS to every website
slides.desc: Chrome 148 swapped Math.tanh for the OS's own math library, and it shows

slides.title: Datacenters now burn a quarter of Ireland's electricity
slides.desc: 23% in 2025, up from just 5% a decade ago, more than every home combined

posts.hook: Anthropic drew fire from every direction today, and Grok's CLI got caught red-handed
posts.caption: zhipu's co-founder makes the case for open ai, 200 economists warn on ai jobs, grok's cli quietly uploaded whole home directories, and anthropic hired monzo's co-founder. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: 200 economists, including Anthropic's own Jack Clark, warn on AI jobs
slides.desc: Nearly 200 economists, 15 of them Nobel laureates, sign "We Must Act Now"

slides.title: Zhipu's co-founder makes his case for keeping frontier AI open
slides.desc: Tang Jie's staff letter lays out a two-year AGI roadmap built on staying open

terms.gloss: ai good enough to do most human jobs, not just one

slides.title: Grok's CLI uploaded users' whole home directories to xAI
slides.desc: An escalation of yesterday's teardown became Hacker News' top complaint

slides.title: A disposable Linux VM for coding agents launched the same day
slides.desc: Show HN's Clawk answers exactly the risk Grok's CLI just proved real

terms.gloss: a virtual computer you can throw away after use

slides.title: Anthropic hired Monzo's Tom Blomfield to its compute team
slides.desc: One of UK tech's biggest names takes a leave of absence from YC to join

slides.title: Meta adds $40B more to its Louisiana data center, past $250B total
slides.desc: The same day Bruce Schneier warns AI data centers mask a deeper power grab

slides.title: Apple's stock jumped 16% as investors fled AI's turbulence
slides.desc: Meanwhile OpenAI insists its own device timeline still holds despite Apple's suit
